rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Is this the office where you are working ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Which is the room you work in ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: This is the room where I sit.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What is the work you are doing ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who is the girl that sang in yesterday's meeting ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: avalu haadid haadu cennagittu, avara jote pitiilu nudisida hudga yaaru ?
rows.english: The song that she sang was good. Who is the boy that accompanied her on the violin ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Is this the song you had heard ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes. this is the song I had heard

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: This is from the film 'Sepoy Ramu'

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Is that so ? that is an unseen film (by me).

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Which is the school where you studied ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: naanu oodid skuulu, niivu oodid skulee.
rows.english: I studed in the same school where you studied.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: He is the master who taught me Kannada.
